2605.22018.title: FRED: A Multi-Modal Autonomous Driving Dataset for Flooded Road Environments
2605.22018.paper_summary: The Flooded Road Environments Dataset (FRED) is, to our knowledge, the first multi-modal autonomous driving dataset specifically targeting the collection of data from scenarios involving water hazards on the road. The dataset contains images from a 2.3 MP FLIR Blackfly USB3 camera, 64-beam 360$^\circ$ point clouds from an Ouster OS1-64 LiDAR, and data from an iXblue ATLANS-C IMU corrected by a Geoflex RTK GNSS, from five separate locations captured both during and after flooding events. The data has been released in two formats: a KITTI-style format for easy integration with existing data tools, and the RTMaps format for direct replay of the vehicle's data capture. We provide semantic labels to enable the training and evaluation of both single-sensor and sensor-fusion methods for water hazard detection. Position and velocity, as well as data captured under dry conditions, are provided to enable the development of location-based detection methods that may incorporate maps, and to evaluate other tasks such as localisation and SLAM.
2605.22018.paper_summary_zh: 洪水道路環境數據集（FRED）是我們所知的第一個多模態自動駕駛數據集，專門針對從涉及道路水災的場景中收集數據。該數據集包含來自2.3 MP FLIR Blackfly USB3相機的圖像、來自Ouster OS1-64 LiDAR的64束360$^\circ$點雲，以及來自iXblue ATLANS-C IMU的數據，這些數據由Geoflex RTK GNSS進行校正，來自五個不同的位置，這些位置在洪水事件期間和之後被捕獲。數據以兩種格式發布：一種是KITTI風格格式，便於與現有數據工具集成，另一種是RTMaps格式，用於直接重播車輛的數據捕獲。我們提供語義標籤，以便於水災檢測的單傳感器和傳感器融合方法的訓練和評估。提供位置和速度數據，以及在乾燥條件下捕獲的數據，以促進基於位置的檢測方法的開發，這些方法可能會結合地圖，並評估其他任務，如定位和SLAM。
2605.22018.author: Connor Malone et.al.
2605.22018.authors: Connor Malone, Sebastien Demmel, Sebastien Glaser
